description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: lint, test, and compatibility. The lint job checks out the repository, sets up Python with caching, installs dependencies, and runs linter and type checker. The test job uses a matrix to test on multiple Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs unit tests. The compatibility job tests compatibility with older Python versions and different fluent.syntax versions.
